signals.headline: US March 2026 CPI: Headline Inflation Surges to 3
signals.raw:
US March 2026 CPI: Headline Inflation Surges to 3.3% YoY (from 2.4%), Monthly +0.9%; Core at 2.6% YoY (from 2.5%, below 2.7% forecast)** | YES | HIGH

US Bureau of Labor Statistics released March 2026 CPI data today, showing annual headline inflation at **3.3%**—highest since May 2024, driven by **+21.2% gas prices** and **+0.9% monthly rise** (largest since June 2022)—while core inflation ticked
